sections.paragraph:
rarely גָּבֹוהַּ Psa 138:6, adj.; constr. גְּבֹהַּ 1Sa 16:7 (compare גָּבָהּ), f. גְּבֹהָה.

(1) high, lofty, of a tree, Eze 17:24 a tower, Isa 2:15 mountain, Gen 7:19 Isa 57:7 stature of a man, 1Sa 9:2 powerful, Ecc 5:7 subst. that which is high, i.q. height, tallness, 1Sa 16:7.

(2) proud, arrogant, Isa 5:15 1Sa 2:3.
